title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Pudding, Big Mom Pirates as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is who I really am!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just makes you lose hope, doesn't it?! Don't worry! You'll soon lose your life, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've deceived countless people like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SH- SHUT UP! WHY SHOULD I HAVE TO LISTEN TO Y-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You useless good-for- nothing! You screwed up big-time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this idiot doesn't die, this whole show can't get on the road!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Third son of the Charlotte family (beans minister) Charlotte Daifuku (lamp-man of the Hoya Hoya no mi+)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you couldn't do it in that second,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is insane! So the bride was trying to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That means the straw hats are here

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: to steal back the groom- to-be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's gonna happen to this marriage ?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut it, you old Hag! My heart is riding on this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The animals are being a huge pain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GUEEeh! What the hell are you playing at?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut it! I'm the security chief! It's gonna look super suspicious if I'm just standing around!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't deal with this whole lot!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
